tree_trunk.name: The Tree Trunk Sawmill & Woodshop
tree_trunk.note: Wix gallery — items don't have individual product pages; 'View on shop' deep-links to the shop landing page.

bloom_johnson.name: Bloom & Johnson Millworks
bloom_johnson.note: Per-item product pages with checkout. Slab inventory currently drying — completion Fall 2027.

black_forest.name: Black Forest Sawmill
black_forest.note: Shopify store. Prices and dimensions parsed from /collections/slabs/products.json. Lumber-quarter notation (e.g. 8/4 = 2") converted to inches; dimension ranges resolved to the larger value.

fb_marketplace.name: Facebook Marketplace — Charlotte, NC
fb_marketplace.note: Peer-to-peer listings, scoped to Charlotte, NC and a ~25-mile radius (FB caps the slider at 25 mi even when 40 is requested). Scraped via the Claude-in-Chrome MCP using the user's already-logged-in Facebook session across queries: walnut slab, live edge, lumber, hardwood, mantel, wood. Items validated against the Charlotte allow-list (Charlotte and neighboring towns within ~40 miles). T/W/L = null because peer-to-peer listings rarely give parseable dimensions; the listing title is shown verbatim and 'View listing' jumps to the FB item page.

warnings.message: Claude-in-Chrome JavaScript execution was blocked on facebook.com (permission denied); fb_marketplace listings left as-is from the prior run.
